title: history arc 07 codex and mcp bridge
summary: The development thread focuses on the history arc 07 codex and MCP bridge, with key decisions including the MCP transport's peer-agnostic expansion and improvements to the bridge system. The arc spans four PRs from 2026-05-05 to 2026-05-07, aiming to enhance transport capabilities and integration. The outcomes include a more flexible and interconnected transport network, facilitating smoother interactions between different systems.
